name: cc-plugin-codex
description: Codex-supervised Claude Code tasks with checkpoints, steering, verification, and tracked logs

scripts.check:syntax: node --check scripts/claude-companion.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/claude-cli.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/job-control.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/process.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/supervision.mjs && node --check hooks/unread-result-hook.mjs && node --check scripts/install-personal.mjs && node --check scripts/uninstall-personal.mjs
scripts.check: npm run check:version-sync && npm run check:changelog && npm run check:syntax && npm run test:supervision
scripts.prepack: npm run check:version-sync && npm run check:changelog
scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && npm run test:supervision
scripts.version: npm run sync:plugin-version && npm run check:version-sync && npm run check:changelog
